briefs.title: 旅遊素材包 — 沖繩海島
briefs.meta: 範例 · 6 B-roll + 1 Flow + 3 內容 + 2 字卡
briefs.summary: 沖繩海島主題的 B-roll、Flow 主打片與字卡文案，拿去 Veo / Flow / Imagen 生成。

items.text: Slow aerial push-in over turquoise shallow water meeting white sand, midday sun, gentle waves, cinematic, no on-screen text, no logos, leave room for narration.
Low-angle static shot of clear water lapping over smooth coral rocks, golden hour, soft bokeh, no text, no logos.
Handheld walking POV along an empty beach path with palm shadows, warm morning light, natural motion, no text.
Underwater tracking shot following light rays through clear tropical water, small fish, calm, no text, no logos.
Drone orbit around a small rocky islet surrounded by gradients of blue, clear sky, cinematic, no text.
Close-up of sea foam sliding back over wet sand in slow motion, soft daylight, seamless, no text, no logos.

A 15-20s cinematic hero clip: sunrise over an Okinawa beach, camera slowly rising from the water surface to reveal the horizon, warm-to-cool light shift, gentle waves, unhurried pacing, film grain, no on-screen text.
沖繩的海之所以那麼藍，是因為海底細白珊瑚砂反射陽光——水越淺、顏色越夢幻。
想拍到最透的海，選上午 9–11 點、退潮前後，光線直射水最清。
把腳步放慢，海島不是用來趕行程的，是用來發呆的。
把整片藍留給自己｜沖繩・慢島指南 (background: minimal turquoise ocean gradient, soft light, lots of negative space)
上午的海最誠實｜拍海攻略 (background: clear shallow water texture from above, bright, clean)
